section_name: Admissibility of Alcohol Concentration or Presence of Substance
text: Evidence of alcohol concentration or the presence of a controlled substance, drug, dangerous drug, or other substance obtained by an analysis authorized by Section 724.014 (Person Incapable of Refusal) is admissible in a civil or criminal action.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.063 — Admissibility of Alcohol Concentration or Presence of Substance

Evidence of alcohol concentration or the presence of a controlled substance, drug, dangerous drug, or other substance obtained by an analysis authorized by Section 724.014 (Person Incapable of Refusal) is admissible in a civil or criminal action.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.165, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*
